extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won stage 7 into Geraardsbergen after surviving repeated attacks from MAHARIČ and VAN AVERMAET on the final cobbled climb.
tactical_patterns: MAHARIČ attacked multiple times on final climb with VAN AVERMAET support, but Matthews defended using Koren's domestique work.
Sunweb sacrificed GC leader Koren to chase breakaway specifically to set up Matthews' sprint, reversing team hierarchy mid-race.
VAN AVERMAET and MAHARIČ coordinated attacks yet both chased stage win, allowing Matthews to mark both without counter-attacking.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: survived coordinated two-rider attacks on cobbled climb then still had sprint power for victory, exceptional late-race resilience
rider_signals.MAHARIČ Matej: positive: strong enough to chase down breakaway solo then immediately attack, but lacked decisive acceleration to drop Matthews
rider_signals.KOREN Soren: positive: willingly sacrificed GC leadership position to pull back breakaway for teammate Matthews, rare mid-race tactical pivot
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: coordinated attacks with Maharič but inability to commit fully to breaking Matthews versus chasing stage win cost him both
